verdict.rationale: The current authoritative source, vantage-finance-v2-2026q2 (final restatement approved 15 July 2026, which explicitly supersedes v1), gives gross profit 13.032 and net revenue 21.895 EUR million, yielding a gross margin of 13.032/21.895 = 59.52%, matching the claimed 59.5%. The v1 figures (12.849/21.712 = 59.18%) are explicitly marked preliminary and superseded, so they are outdated rather than competing.

evidence.span_text: PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2.
